title: OpenStax Calculus Volume 2
description: A source card for the OpenStax Calculus Volume 2 textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Calculus Volume 2 develops integration techniques, applications, differential equations, sequences, series, parametric equations, and polar coordinates.
Use this source for advanced students who need structured explanations and vocabulary support around accumulation, approximation, and mathematical modeling.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.
